description: Alex Dreyfus discusses the evolution of Chiliz and Socios, emphasizing the importance of engaging sports fans rather than traditional crypto users. He reflects on the legitimacy brought to the crypto industry by Bitcoin ETFs and the challenges of educating both clubs and fans about crypto. Dreyfus highlights the need for clubs to join the crypto space while ensuring user satisfaction to generate revenue.
topic_summary: At Binance Blockchain Week 2024, Alex Dreyfus shares insights on the growth of Chiliz and Socios, the impact of Bitcoin ETFs on the crypto industry, and the challenges of bridging traditional sports with crypto technology [t=37:52].
